headline.en:
Write once in plain Markdown
publish anywhere in one keystroke

sub.en: Quill watches your notes folder, renders each file to a static page, and pushes the whole site to your host without a build config.

title.en: Plain Markdown in, static site out

body.en: Point quill at any folder of .md files and it renders a fast static site — no front-matter ceremony, no framework to learn.
Edit a note and quill re-renders that page in milliseconds, streaming the diff to an open preview tab over a local socket.
quill publish diffs the built output against your host and uploads only what changed — atomic, resumable, no CI required.

headline.en: From a notes folder to a live site in seconds

sub.en: Open source, MIT, no account, no paywall.
